case_title: KIM NGUYEN VS. VIKING PAINTING & REMODLING

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VIKING PAINTING & REMODLING JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ARNOLD DOLLENTAS, OWNER, AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - VIKING PAINTING & REMODLING; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - VACANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
